---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{python}
# Single stacked ridgeline plot of log10FCO2 for each Site_Name
# Ordered by Caldera; colored by Soil_Type; legend above in one line; x-axis 0..5

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib as mpl
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from matplotlib.patches import Patch

CSV_PATH = 'BothCalderasFluxesIsotopes.csv'
PNG_OUT = 'ridgeline_log10FCO2_stacked_by_caldera_TOPLEGEND_ONELINE.png'
PDF_OUT = 'ridgeline_log10FCO2_stacked_by_caldera_TOPLEGEND_ONELINE.pdf'

# Tuning
BW_ADJUST = 0.8
PER_SITE_HEIGHT_IN = 0.28
MAX_BAND_HEIGHT = 0.9

raw = pd.read_csv(CSV_PATH)
raw.columns = [c.strip() for c in raw.columns]
raw['log10FCO2'] = pd.to_numeric(raw.get('log10FCO2'), errors='coerce')
DF = raw.dropna(subset=['log10FCO2']).copy()
for col in ['Caldera','Site_Name','Soil_Type']:
    DF[col] = DF[col].astype(str)

# Fixed x range as requested
x_min, x_max = 0, 5

# Modal Soil_Type per (Caldera, Site_Name)
mode_soil = (
    DF.groupby(['Caldera','Site_Name','Soil_Type']).size()
      .reset_index(name='n')
      .sort_values(['Caldera','Site_Name','n'], ascending=[True,True,False])
      .drop_duplicates(['Caldera','Site_Name'])
      .set_index(['Caldera','Site_Name'])['Soil_Type']
)

# Order ridgelines: by Caldera then Site_Name
caldera_order = sorted(DF['Caldera'].unique())
site_order = [(cal, s)
              for cal in caldera_order
              for s in sorted(DF.loc[DF['Caldera']==cal, 'Site_Name'].unique())]

# Colors by Soil_Type
soil_types = sorted(DF['Soil_Type'].unique())
palette = sns.color_palette('Set2', max(3, len(soil_types)))
soil_to_color = {soil: palette[i % len(palette)] for i, soil in enumerate(soil_types)}

# Figure (extra top margin for one-line legend)
n_sites_total = len(site_order)
fig_height = n_sites_total * PER_SITE_HEIGHT_IN + 1.9
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, fig_height))

mpl.rcParams['axes.spines.right'] = False
mpl.rcParams['axes.spines.top'] = False

yticks, yticklabels = [], []
current_idx = 0

for cal, site in site_order:
    vals = DF[(DF['Caldera']==cal) & (DF['Site_Name']==site)]['log10FCO2'].dropna().values
    soil = mode_soil.get((cal, site), None)
    color = soil_to_color.get(soil, 'gray')

    if vals.size >= 2:
        existing_lines = len(ax.lines)
        sns.kdeplot(x=vals, ax=ax, bw_adjust=BW_ADJUST, clip=(x_min, x_max),
                    color='black', lw=1, fill=False)
        new_lines = ax.lines[existing_lines:]
        if new_lines:
            line = new_lines[-1]
            x, y = line.get_data()
            try: line.remove()
            except Exception: pass
            y_max = np.max(y) if np.size(y) else 0
            y_scaled = (y / y_max) * MAX_BAND_HEIGHT if y_max > 0 else y
            y_offset = current_idx
            ax.fill_between(x, y_offset, y_offset + y_scaled, color=color, alpha=0.9, linewidth=0)
            ax.hlines(y_offset, x_min, x_max, color='white', linewidth=0.6, alpha=0.8)
        else:
            ax.plot(vals, np.full_like(vals, current_idx+0.1), '|', color=color, ms=10, mew=1)
    elif vals.size == 1:
        ax.plot([vals[0]], [current_idx + 0.1], marker='o', ms=3, color=color, alpha=0.9)
        ax.hlines(current_idx, x_min, x_max, color='white', linewidth=0.6, alpha=0.8)

    yticks.append(current_idx)
    yticklabels.append(site)
    current_idx += 1

# Caldera separators & labels
pos = 0
for cal in caldera_order:
    n = sum(1 for (c, _) in site_order if c == cal)
    if n == 0: continue
    ax.axhline(pos - 0.5, color='0.7', lw=0.6, alpha=0.6)
    ax.text(x_min, pos + (n - 1) / 2, cal, ha='left', va='center',
            fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='0.25')
    pos += n

# Axes
ax.set_xlim(x_min, x_max)  # <- fixed to 0..5
ax.set_ylim(-0.5, n_sites_total - 0.5 + 0.9)
ax.set_yticks(yticks)
ax.set_yticklabels(yticklabels, fontsize=8)
ax.set_xlabel('log10FCO2', fontsize=11)
ax.set_ylabel('Site_Name', fontsize=11)
ax.grid(axis='x', alpha=0.2)

# Legend: top, single row
handles = [Patch(facecolor=soil_to_color[s], edgecolor='none', label=s) for s in soil_types]
ax.legend(handles=handles, title='Soil_Type',
          loc='upper center', bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, 1.04),
          frameon=False, ncol=len(soil_types), fontsize=9, title_fontsize=10)

plt.tight_layout(rect=(0, 0, 1, 0.98))
fig.savefig(PNG_OUT, dpi=200)
fig.savefig(PDF_OUT)
```
